Let's start a project together

Hello.

I'm Ibrahim Ahmed, a graphic designer with 3+ years of experience building brand identities, marketing visuals, and short-form video for F&B, fashion, tech, and personal-brand clients. Alongside that, I'm training as a physical therapist — a background that keeps my design process research-driven and detail-first. I also create medical & fitness content under my own brand, drshab.official, blending design with health science.

04
Brand Identity + Research Presentation — 1st Place Winner

The 3rd Conference for Student Research & Creativity

Designed the full visual identity for the university's research conference — logo system, color and type guidelines, and real-world brand applications — plus the accompanying presentation deck on branding theory. Took 1st place for poster presentation and design at the event.

05
Brand Identity — F&B Concept

Hungergo

A full identity system for a burger-concept brand: a logo built to work across light and dark backgrounds, a warm navy / gold / espresso palette, and brand collateral including business cards and application mockups.

06
Freelance Client Work — Ismailia, Egypt

Emkan

Arabic-language social media design for Emkan's partner program — translating a multi-step registration flow into a clean, scannable infographic for the company's social channels.

07
Social & Campaign Design — Multi-Industry

Campaign & Ad Concepts

Concept ad designs across skincare, footwear, and food delivery, plus a bilingual Ramadan greeting for Suez Canal University's student union — built to show range across industries, languages, and tone.

08
Logo Design

Diamond Technology

A geometric, interlocking mark for a technology brand — designed to hold up at icon scale and across light and dark backgrounds.

09
Fashion + Print

Streetwear Concept

Technical garment specs — front, back, fabric, sizing — through to final mockup and launch poster, covering the full process from production-ready file to marketing asset.
